title: Understanding Your CloudDash Invoice
content:
CloudDash invoices are generated on the same day each month based on your subscription start date. Understanding invoice line items helps you reconcile charges and identify unexpected costs.

Invoice Header: Contains your organization name, organization ID (org_XXXXX), billing period (e.g., Jan 15 - Feb 14, 2026), invoice number (INV-YYYY-NNNNN), and payment method last four digits. Enterprise customers receive invoices via email and the CloudDash billing portal with PO number references.

Standard Line Items: Base Plan Charge reflects your current tier (Starter $49, Pro $199, or Enterprise custom). This is a flat monthly or annual fee. Team Seat Overages appear when active members exceed your plan's included seats. Pro plans include 15 seats; each additional seat is $25/month, prorated from the date the member was added.

Integration Overages: Pro plans include 3 cloud provider integrations. Additional integrations are $50/month each, charged from the date the integration was connected. Starter plans cannot add integrations beyond 1; attempting to do so prompts an upgrade.

Add-On Charges: SSO add-on for Pro ($100/month), extended metric retention beyond plan defaults ($75/month per additional 90 days), and dedicated support packages for Enterprise are listed separately.

Usage-Based Charges: CloudDash does not currently charge per metric or per API call on standard plans. Enterprise custom contracts may include usage-based components for metrics ingestion exceeding agreed thresholds (typically 10M data points/month).

Tax: Sales tax or VAT is calculated based on your billing address. Tax-exempt organizations can upload certificates under Settings > Billing > Tax Exemption.

Download invoices as PDF from Settings > Billing > Invoice History. For billing questions, email billing@clouddash.io with your invoice number.
